content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Palindrome Partitioning (MCM Variation)". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
constraints: s consists only of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The input will contain a string s of length n, where 1 <= n <= 10^5.
content.outputFormat: The output will be a 2D array where each sub-array contains a partition of the input string into palindromic substrings.

solution.approach: Use backtracking to generate all possible partitions of the input string and check if each partition is a palindrome.
